mnemonics: PICK A TOPIC: Prioritize Important Concepts, Know All Topics, Organize Ideas Clearly
keyPoints: Focus on mastering one major concept from each module.
Ensure your chosen question demonstrates comprehensive understanding.
Structure your answer with a clear introduction, body, and conclusion.
commonMistakes: Selecting a question from an easy but low-scoring topic instead of a complex, high-value one.
Attempting to answer multiple questions partially instead of one fully.
Providing vague, general answers instead of specific, detailed explanations with examples.
